subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! In the verse of the Qur'án, "The hand of God is above their hands" - this is manifest and assured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در ایه فرقان ید الله فوق ایدیهم نازل و این محقق و ثابت و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
